anti_claim: This standard is a public-safe schema contract projection only; it does not authorize release, provider calls, private-data equivalence, or whole-system correctness.

anti_claim_contract.rule: fixture-backed proof must state what it does not prove

anti_claims: This public standard does not copy private source bodies or prove public runtime completeness.
This public standard does not authorize release, hosted-public readiness, publication, recipient work, provider calls, or private-data equivalence.

omission_receipt.reason: public standard carries schema and id refs only

omission_receipt_contract.rule: compressed views must list omitted bodies and drilldown refs

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite validator_id, input fixture ids, output artifact refs, omissions, and anti_claim ids

source_coupling_contract.rule: if generated or projected, record source input digest and stale-source behavior

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A negative marketing list or vague caution.
failure_modes: untyped artifact admitted into rebuilt substrate
current public microcosm surface treated as sufficient without coverage check
private source material exposed instead of synthetic/schema-only fixture
projection claims source authority without coupling receipt
standard_payload.ontology: A named prohibited move that protects the substrate from recurrent failure shapes.
standard_payload.teleology: Make anti-goals executable and testable instead of leaving them as prose warnings.

validation_rules: validate required fields and enum values against this standard
reject missing source_refs unless the fixture declares synthetic origin
reject authority upgrades not backed by receipt_refs
source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown/mermaid/atlas are generated projections of this JSON source.

field_semantics.failure_statement: the failure shape the substrate rejects

anti_principle_payload_contract.purpose: Define how anti-principles route failure and rejection pressure without becoming positive support evidence or verified anti-axiom rejection.

accepted_source_refs: core/axiom_organ_routing.json anti_principle_ids plus principle_ids on the same axiom row
non_laundering_rules: anti-principle guards are failure and routing boundaries, not positive support for axioms
anti_principle_payload.guarded_principle_ids mirrors negates_failure_of routing and cannot certify principle support or falsity
anti_principle.negates_failure_of edges name principle-failure guards, not proof that the principle is false or unsupported
anti-axiom rejection mapping remains governed by std_microcosm_axiom.axiom_payload_contract.anti_axiom_rejection_contract; anti-principle edges cannot verify exact per-obligation rejection
negative-case receipts and endpoint coverage may raise routing pressure but cannot certify rejection without source-owned obligation mapping
generated markdown, graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence

residual_policy.unpopulated_selective_relations: typed residual pressure until source authority names a resolvable principle failure target

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing anti_principle without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_anti_principle and propagate through every governed artifact + projection

atlas_card.surface: agent entry / option-surface band / atlas card
atlas_card.note: agent-routing projection; must link back to JSON source

link_resolution.rule: every required/selective lattice edge target must resolve to an existing instance id OR be marked planned

projection_freshness.rule: generated markdown/mermaid/atlas must be regenerable from JSON source; a stale projection is a trust downgrade, not source authority

compression.purpose: one_line drives the compressed per-instance row projection (e.g. the 77-organ atlas) for agent entry + routing

provisional_policy.axiom_posture: imposed constitutional commitment; provenance optional; never evidence-gated
provisional_policy.candidate_lane: candidate/provisional doctrine may exist ONLY in an explicit import/drafting lane OUTSIDE public source, never as a shipped public-doctrine status
provisional_policy.overrides: macro candidate-axiom 'pressure only / not active law' posture does NOT apply to shipped microcosm public doctrine

refinement_provenance.method: additive_envelope_merge; required_fields/authority_ceiling/anti_claims preserved verbatim; envelope landed as new keys (not via required_fields)
